hero.name: Negar Shahhosseini
hero.description: Business management graduate and front-end developer — where business thinking meets clean code, especially in e-commerce and digital products.

about.title: Between business and code
about.description: My path started with business management, but my love for building things led me into front-end development. Now I keep both together: I understand the product, and I can build it.
about.card1Text: I studied business management and learned to see products through the lens of market, users, and profitability.
about.card2Text: I build interfaces with React and Next.js that are fast, clean, and reliable.
about.card3Text: When a developer also speaks the language of business, technical decisions get smarter.

skills.title: What I work with
skills.description: A mix of technical and business skills — this variety helps me see the product more completely.

projects.title: Things I've built
projects.description: A few of the projects I've worked on. Each one was a step toward learning and getting better.

experience.title: Experience & Education
experience.description: The key milestones that shaped me so far.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.description: For collaborations, projects, or even a simple hello — I'd love to hear from you.
contact.successText: Thanks for reaching out, I'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

footer.role: Front-end Developer · Passionate about business & digital products
